title: Security Role Changes vs RACI in ServiceNow CMDB Ownership

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=itsm sourcetype=snow:cmdb_ci earliest=-90d
| where match(name,"(?i)prod)")
| stats latest(sys_updated_on) as last_update, values(managed_by) as owners by name
| lookup security_raci.csv ci_name AS name OUTPUT expected_owner
| where NOT match(mvjoin(owners,"|"), expected_owner)
value: Correlates CI ownership role changes with expected RACI contacts so responsibilities for assets remain traceable.
implementation: (1) Maintain RACI lookup from ISO SoA; (2) normalize CMDB fields; (3) quarterly access governance review.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
